description: Workflow hooks. SessionStart persists workflow shell environment exports when .workflow/config.yml exists and injects provider-backed workflow authoring policy only for main sessions. UserPromptSubmit reads mentioned and pending GitHub issue references through cache-aware provider reads and injects project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext. Stop records session-mentioned issues as pending without provider reads or JSON output.

hooks.description: Block local workflow projection writes until required authoring files were read
Record reads of workflow authoring files in the session ledger
Inject workflow authoring resolver policy for configured workflow projects in main sessions
Cache mentioned GitHub issue references and inject project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext
Record session-mentioned GitHub issues as pending without provider reads or Stop JSON output
